title: Example 9-1 welded fitting into channel
notes: This input models one side plate only, as done in Shigley Example 9-1.
The 50-kN external load is divided equally between two symmetric welded side plates.
The load line is horizontal, so the moment arm is the vertical offset from the weld-group centroid to the load line.

For this geometry, Shigley reports x_bar = 10.4 mm from the left leg and y_bar = d/2 = 95 mm. The eccentricity used for the moment calculation is l = 100 + 10.4 = 110.4 mm, giving M = 25 kN * 110.4 mm = 2760 N·m.
